name: get_document_status
description: Check the translation progress and current status of a specific document within a project. Returns detailed statistics including word counts by status (untranslated, in progress, completed), workflow stage progress, and assigned translators. Use this to monitor translation progress and determine when a document is ready for download.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the document to check. Obtained from upload_document or from the project's document list.
